character.name: Undead ghoul familiar, isometric pixel art, gothic horror. Small hunched cadaverous creature, stooped posture. Dark purple-black body #1a0a20, purple vein lines visible, white claws, tiny skull-like head with two glowing violet eyes #c896ff. Ally, not enemy — slightly smaller silhouette. Crisp pixel art, transparent background.
